name: Patient 47
history: Master's in engineering and robotics experience. Past remorse about not dedicating enough time to a project.
intermediate_belief: If I'm not perfect, I'll be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: My technical skills are my only value; without them I'm nothing.
coping_strategies: Over-preparation, avoidance of romantic risk, rumination about mistakes.
situation: Sent email to someone interested in dating and received no response.
auto_thought: "The email was stupid. I came on too strong/not strong enough. They're not interested."
behavior: Analyzes email repeatedly, asks friends to review it, checks email obsessively for response.
